series_metadata.series_title: Real Estate Disciplinary Files - Public Records
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule pertains to records received by the Division regarding a complaint against a person engaging in unlicensed activity (ORC 4735.52 & 4764.16) or a complaint against a real estate licensee, a foreign real estate dealer or salesperson or a licensed home inspector. This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, the complaint, records received with the complaint, notice of hearing and charging document, citation letter, proof of service related to the formal hearings or orders, settlement agreements, hearing officer reports, objections to hearing officer reports, transcripts, commission orders, exhibits submitted to the commission for its review in the matter or documents related to any appeals to a court.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copy is retained on-site until the disciplinary file is closed at the administrative level or upon the expiration of appeals, whichever is later. Then, the paper copy is imaged and indexed on the computer. Upon confirmation that the paper copy was imaged and indexed on the computer, then the paper copy is to be destroyed. ; Microform: Any images on microfiche are to be retained for five years after the disciplinary file is closed on the administrative level or upon the expiration of the appeals, whichever is later. Then, the image on the microfiche is to be destroyed. ; Electronic: Images on the computer are to be retained for five years after the disciplinary file is closed on the administrative level or upon the expiration of the appeals, whichever is later. Then, the image on the computer is to be destroyed., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
